steps.explanation: Increasing w by 43% means adding 43% of w to the original: w + 0.43w.

• A: 1.43w — 1 + 0.43 = 1.43, so 1.43w represents w increased by 43%. That matches choice A — A is correct.
  • B: 0.57w — This equals w decreased by 43% (1 - 0.43 = 0.57), the opposite operation. Eliminated.
  • C: 43w — This multiplies w by 43, a 4300% increase, not 43%. Eliminated.
  • D: 0.43w — This is just 43% of w, not w increased by 43%. Eliminated.
